mapper.sql: SELECT c.symbol, MAX(c.high_price) AS three_month_high FROM stock_candle_daily c CROSS JOIN ( SELECT MAX(trade_date) AS latest_trade_date FROM stock_candle_daily ) date_window WHERE c.trade_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(date_window.latest_trade_date, INTERVAL 3 MONTH) AND date_window.latest_trade_date GROUP BY c.symbol
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO index_constituent ( index_code, symbol, name, exchange, sector, current_member, first_seen_at, last_seen_at, removed_at, source ) VALUES ( #{indexCode}, #{symbol}, #{name}, #{exchange}, #{sector}, TRUE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, NULL, #{source} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), exchange = VALUES(exchange), sector = VALUES(sector), current_member = TRUE, last_seen_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, removed_at = NULL, source = VALUES(source)
mapper.update: UPDATE index_constituent SET removed_at = COALESCE(removed_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND current_member = FALSE AND removed_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM index_constituent WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND current_member = TRUE
SELECT symbol FROM index_constituent WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND current_member = TRUE AND symbol NOT IN ('TICKER', 'SECURITY') AND UPPER(COALESCE(sector, '')) <> 'TICKER' ORDER BY symbol

SELECT m.symbol FROM stock_index_membership_snapshot m WHERE m.index_code = #{indexCode} AND m.snapshot_date = #{snapshotDate} AND m.is_member = TRUE AND m.symbol NOT IN ('TICKER', 'SECURITY') AND UPPER(COALESCE(m.sector, '')) <> 'TICKER' GROUP BY m.symbol ORDER BY m.symbol

SELECT i.symbol, COALESCE(p.name, i.name) AS name, p.logo, i.sector, p.finnhub_industry AS industry, p.market_cap, inst.shares_change_pct AS institutionSharesChangePct, inst.holder_count AS institutionHolderCount, inst.report_quarter AS institutionReportQuarter, q.current_price, q.previous_close, q.open_price, q.high_price, q.low_price, highs.three_month_high AS threeMonthHigh, m.pe_normalized_annual, m.pb_annual, m.roe_ttm, sl.integrated_score AS signalScore, sl.confidence AS signalConfidence, sl.tone AS signalTone, sl.calculated_at AS signalCalculatedAt, dq.quality_score AS dataQualityScore, dq.quality_label AS dataQualityLabel, dq.tone AS dataQualityTone, dq.excluded_fields_json AS dataQualityExcludedFieldsJson, sl.valuation_score AS valuationScore, sl.quality_score AS qualityScore, sl.growth_score AS growthScore, sl.stability_score AS stabilityScore, sl.earnings_score AS earningsScore, sl.analyst_score AS analystScore, sl.news_score AS newsScore, sl.momentum_score AS momentumScore, sl.risk_score AS riskScore , er.expected_excess_return_pct AS expectedExcessReturnPct, er.calibrated_upside_probability_pct AS calibratedUpsideProbabilityPct, er.drawdown_risk_pct AS drawdownRiskPct, er.confidence AS expectedConfidence, er.model_version AS expectedModelVersion, er.signal_date AS expectedSignalDate FROM index_constituent i LEFT JOIN company_profile p ON p.symbol = i.symbol LEFT JOIN stock_quote_cache q ON q.symbol = i.symbol LEFT JOIN (
) highs ON highs.symbol = i.symbol LEFT JOIN stock_institution_flow_quarterly inst ON inst.symbol = i.symbol AND inst.report_quarter = ( SELECT MAX(report_quarter) FROM stock_institution_flow_quarterly WHERE symbol = i.symbol ) LEFT JOIN stock_metric_snapshot m ON m.symbol = i.symbol AND m.metric_date = ( SELECT MAX(metric_date) FROM stock_metric_snapshot WHERE symbol = i.symbol ) LEFT JOIN stock_signal_latest sl ON sl.symbol = i.symbol LEFT JOIN stock_data_quality_latest dq ON dq.symbol = i.symbol LEFT JOIN stock_expected_return_snapshot er ON er.index_code = i.index_code AND er.symbol = i.symbol AND er.horizon_days = 20 AND er.model_version = 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V9' AND er.signal_date = ( SELECT MAX(signal_date) FROM stock_expected_return_snapshot WHERE index_code = i.index_code AND symbol = i.symbol AND horizon_days = 20 AND model_version = 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V9' ) WHERE i.index_code = #{indexCode} AND i.current_member = TRUE AND i.symbol NOT IN ('TICKER', 'SECURITY') AND UPPER(COALESCE(i.sector, '')) <> 'TICKER' ORDER BY p.market_cap DESC, i.symbol
